content: Swift 6.0.x toolchain available for Ubuntu 24.04 Noble from swift.org/install/linux/ubuntu/24_04/. Official tarball installation: download, extract, add to PATH. Dependencies: libcurl4, libpython3.10, libxml2, libsqlite3-0. Swiftly is alternative installer. Known issue: SwiftPM hangs on incremental builds in Swift 6.2 on Ubuntu 24.04 (Swift 6.0 stable).
